title: 谷歌陷入混乱，市值蒸发数千亿美元。
description: Transformer 之父走了，诺贝尔奖得主走了，预训练的核心也走了——一周之内，就有四个人离开了谷歌。
titleZh: 谷歌陷入混乱，市值蒸发数千亿美元。
titleEn: Google is in turmoil, with its market value evaporating by hundreds of billions of dollars. Can Gemini Spark save the day?
descriptionZh: Transformer 之父走了，诺贝尔奖得主走了，预训练的核心也走了——一周之内，就有四个人离开了谷歌。
descriptionEn: The father of Transformer is gone, the Nobel laureate is gone, the core of pre-training is gone—within a week, four people have left Google. Can the latest card, Gemini Spark, restore Google's morale?

title: Karpathy 再次出击，颠覆 RAG，将你的笔记变成第二个大脑
description: 知识第一次可以像代码一样复合。
titleZh: Karpathy 再次出击，颠覆 RAG，将你的笔记变成第二个大脑
titleEn: Karpathy strikes again, overturning RAG and turning your notes into a second brain
descriptionZh: 知识第一次可以像代码一样复合。
descriptionEn: For the first time, knowledge can compound like code. Andrej Karpathy, former founding member of OpenAI and former Senior Director of AI at Tesla, proposes a bold move: stop using RAG to retrieve your knowledge base—let the large model "compile" it into a continuously growing living Wiki. In just over two months, he has garnered over 5,000 stars on GitHub.

title: 谷歌与字节跳动正面交锋：最新轻量级 Nano Banana 2 四秒内生成图像，每张图像仅花费 0.034 美元，甚至可以直接输出视频
description: 比字节跳动便宜，画质和延迟均超越对手
titleZh: 谷歌与字节跳动正面交锋：最新轻量级 Nano Banana 2 四秒内生成图像，每张图像仅花费 0.034 美元，甚至可以直接输出视频
titleEn: Google goes head-to-head with ByteDance: latest lightweight Nano Banana 2 generates images in four seconds, costing only $0.034 per image, and can even output videos directly

title: Claude Science 在短短几周内完成了两年的工作——10 倍的研究加速真的到来了吗？
description: 这一次，Anthropic 并没有推出更智能的研究模型，而是解决了研究的基础：它第一次将科学研究分解为可逐步审核的流程。
titleZh: Claude Science 在短短几周内完成了两年的工作——10 倍的研究加速真的到来了吗？
titleEn: Claude Science completes two years of work in just a few weeks—has 10x research acceleration truly arrived?
descriptionZh: 这一次，Anthropic 并没有推出更智能的研究模型，而是解决了研究的基础：它第一次将科学研究分解为可逐步审核的流程。
descriptionEn: This time, Anthropic didn’t launch a smarter research model, but instead tackled the very foundation of research: for the first time, it broke down scientific research into a step-by-step auditable pipeline.
